message:
beads: close 8n0rm + jkcka parent epics

Closes the last two parent epics after the 3 deferred follow-up
beads (8n0rm.6, 8n0rm.8, jkcka.8) all landed in this session.

Final epic tallies:
- crkft: 5 children closed (closed earlier this session)
- 8n0rm: 8 children closed (7 original + 8n0rm.8 migration)
- jkcka: 8 children closed (7 original + jkcka.8 migration)
- arch-int: closed (closed earlier with --force)

Every bead filed under the architectural-debt initiative is now
resolved. The 3-epic sprint is complete.
